status: exact finite quotient/address and pinned connector-mask census; projection-only, not an availability lemma, far-secant lemma, safety fixed point, or unconditional theorem

canonical_run.command: env OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 VECLIB_MAXIMUM_THREADS=1 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=1 nice -n 15 python3 -B design/x_projection_coset_address.py run --cache /tmp/no-new-x-line-domains.bin --metadata /tmp/no-new-x-line-L5-canonical.json --output /tmp/x-projection-coset-address-canonical.json

exact_algebra.child_interior_address: for parent gap start a and lateral prefix u, address=(a+c(u),q(u))
exact_algebra.collision_criterion: two child yz coordinates agree if and only if their exact addresses agree

projection_locality.analytic_proof: A length-at-most-five interior prefix lies in [-8,8]^2. Equal digits give delta_c=((-delta_y+3*delta_z)/9,-delta_y/3), so the two carry coordinates differ by at most 7 and 5 respectively.
projection_locality.interpretation: x-projection poisoning is an exact bounded-range constraint; it has no far-secant tail
projection_locality.global_caveat: bounded range does not itself imply a global extension or a finite online safety strategy

static_25_fibre_cage.effect: every connector word has a first interior in an occupied fibre and is projection-killed
static_25_fibre_cage.triple_free_static_lift: one point per fibre can be made triple-free by choosing integer x coordinates successively outside finitely many forbidden values
static_25_fibre_cage.reachability_caveat: not proved reachable as a contiguous ordered MENU walk or under the projection-fresh selector

proved: the quotient coordinate, canonical carry, and exact address bijection
analytic radius-seven projection locality for every radius-two MENU word of length at most five
the named pinned-cache word, prefix, carry, role-mask, digit-simple, and sharp-radius counts
the 25-fibre cage refutes availability based only on triple-freeness and yz-fibre multiplicity at most two
the projection effect uses only the one role mask actually selected at each realized gap
not_proved: reachability of the static cage in the ordered construction
positive connector availability in every reachable state
a simultaneous all-gap role-mask assignment or greatest safety fixed point
transition closure under alternate realized connector histories
control of non-x-parallel local or far secants
an unconditional theorem for Erdos problem 193
